race.comment: Couple of key scratchings leaves us with SAYALERO (9) on top. She's a filly who resumes having run in a strong race on debut behind Unit Five who went on to win the Magic Millions on the Gold Coast. She was in the market there and can be a quick improver this time around. PURSUIT (4) is a colt by Pierro on debut for the Maher yard who looks primed for a good debut having led and won a jumpout impressively leading in. He was an expensive purchase who should go well. STONEFLIGHT (5) is a colt by Per Incanto for the Hayes yard who has also jumped out nicely for the leading 2yo stable. He draws nicely and looks a key winning chance. LADY OF POWER (7) is a filly by Written Tycoon on debut for the McEvoy yard who has won a jumpout and has claims.
